overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exiting a shower/elevator interior, walking through a sunlit dystopian urban alleyway with industrial buildings, ascending an external metal staircase, and exploring dimly lit indoor corridors with graffiti-covered walls.

camera pulls back and tilts down toward shower drain

agents.ego_description: manipulating shower control panel with tattooed hands and black nail polish while water falls

entered.detail: vertical dark panel with circular metallic buttons and water controls
streams of water falling from above the panel
beige tiled walls of the shower enclosure

segments.scene_description: Inside a compact elevator-like shower enclosure, the character interacts with a control panel using tattooed hands. Water streams down from above as the camera slowly pans and tilts downward toward the drain, ending with the scene fading to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban back alley with industrial buildings and distant megatowers

pedestrian walks past from right to left across the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through urban alleyway observing industrial buildings and distant megatowers

black vintage-style car with steam rising from nearby vent
tall futuristic skyscraper with digital billboards and industrial structures
steam rising from ground vent in the middle of the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a bright sunlit urban alley in a dystopian city. The camera walks forward past a parked black car with steam rising nearby, turning right to reveal a large blue and yellow industrial building. A pedestrian crosses the path from right to left as distant megatowers with digital billboards loom against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: external metal fire escape staircase between buildings

events.description: begins ascending steep external metal staircase attached to building

agents.ego_description: climbing external metal staircase with grated steps and railings

entered.detail: rusted metal stairs with grated steps and side railings casting striped shadows
metal walkway with railings overlooking the street below

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep external metal staircase attached to the industrial building. Sunlight filters through the railings creating striped shadows on the steps. The camera climbs past the blue and yellow wall, reaching an upper catwalk level with views of the surrounding urban decay and distant towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered apartment corridor with cyan lighting

events.description: enters building through metal door from external catwalk into dimly lit corridor
approaching elevator area with cyan fluorescent lighting and graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridors with jellyfish graffiti walls toward apartment elevator

entered.detail: narrow hallway with concrete floors and graffiti-covered walls
white counter with green neon lighting near entrance
metal elevator doors with digital control panel
blue painted wall with white and red dripping jellyfish graffiti
cyan-colored fluorescent tube lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: Entering the building from the catwalk, the scene shifts to a dimly lit interior corridor with cyan fluorescent lighting. The camera walks past a reception desk and along walls covered in distinctive jellyfish graffiti, approaching a metal elevator door at the end of the hall. Neon lights from outside are visible through distant windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a confined, sterile interior into a sprawling dystopian cityscape and back into a moody industrial corridor. It begins inside a compact shower enclosure where tattooed hands interact with a control panel under streaming water, before the view pans down toward the drain and transitions into a bright, sunlit urban alley. As the camera moves forward past a steaming black car and a crossing pedestrian, the scene opens up to reveal towering megatowers and a large blue and yellow industrial building. The perspective then ascends a steep external metal staircase, climbing through striped shadows and past the industrial walls to reach an elevated catwalk overlooking the urban decay. Finally, the camera enters the building, shifting from the brilliant daylight into a dimly lit interior corridor defined by cyan fluorescent lighting and jellyfish graffiti as it approaches a metal elevator door.
